name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 12 Jun 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.56"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The sales order view page has been updated with a new animation when order totals are being calculated."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Added a trigger to download Catch sales orders every hour, to ensure same-day shipping orders can be acted upon promptly."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Shipping spend promotions can now be configured to apply before or after discounts."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Staff access can be blocked to the following inventory pages: "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Suppliers"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Basic stock adjustment"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Basic stock take"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Neto Inventory stocktake"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Neto Inventory adjustment"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
